steps.note: 12 data-source contracts grounded against publishers (9 tier A, 3 tier B), incl. China (nbs/pboc marginals_only, safe mixed). Merged to main via PR #2.

Assembled the global SFC FWTW matrix from real pulled data (706 OBSERVED cells: Fed EFA 585, TIC 36 named-country + 1 residual bucket, BIS LBS 76, COFER 9 marginal). RAS/Sinkhorn run, NON-CONVERGENT by structural sparsity (only the TIC US-Treasury column has area-by-area support; row residual L2 ~ $3.96tn) — reported, not smoothed. GCAP China reallocation magnitude recorded as HOLE (counterparty-nationality basis absent from the 12 contracts; direction upward, ~$600bn-class figure neither confirmed nor assumed). Integrity critic BLOCKED a false-provenance label on the TIC residual; fixed by retaining all 36 publisher-named countries (residual now = publisher's true $710.8bn All Other). DP3 not begun.
